watches.name: .NET SDK release
watches.notes: Review project setup, SDK assumptions, and C# guidance when a new SDK release ships.

watches.name: .NET runtime release
watches.notes: Review general .NET guidance, worker behavior, and runtime compatibility notes.

watches.name: ASP.NET Core release
watches.notes: Review web-stack skills when ASP.NET Core ships platform changes or release notes.

watches.name: .NET MAUI release
watches.notes: Review cross-platform UI guidance when MAUI ships new features or platform notes.

watches.name: Windows App SDK release
watches.notes: Review WinUI and Windows-specific guidance when the Windows App SDK changes.

watches.name: Entity Framework Core release
watches.notes: Review EF Core behavior, migration guidance, and provider assumptions.

watches.name: Microsoft Orleans release
watches.notes: Review Orleans guidance when grain runtime, hosting, or provider support changes.

watches.name: dotnet/extensions release
watches.notes: Review Microsoft.Extensions guidance and AI-related extensions integration notes.

watches.name: Azure Functions .NET worker release
watches.notes: Review isolated worker guidance and package version baselines when the worker runtime changes.

watches.name: ML.NET release
watches.notes: Review ML.NET guidance when the training, inference, or CLI toolchain changes.

watches.name: Semantic Kernel release
watches.notes: Review Semantic Kernel guidance because APIs and orchestration patterns evolve quickly.

watches.name: Microsoft Agent Framework release
watches.notes: Review agent orchestration guidance and package maturity when Agent Framework releases change.
